question_intent: Average number of goals scored by teams in the Eastern Conference in 2006 that lost at least one game

plan.question_intent: Average number of goals scored by teams in the Eastern Conference in 2006 that lost at least one game
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.name, leaf_1.gf
FROM teams AS leaf_1
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON leaf_1.tmid = tvt.tmid AND leaf_1.year = tvt.year
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON leaf_1.confid = ab.code
WHERE (leaf_1.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l >= 1)

build_logs.notes: Average number of goals scored by teams in the Eastern Conference in 2006 that lost at least one game

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid
JOIN teams AS ot ON tvt.oppid = ot.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON ot.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year = 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (tvt.l = 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.gf)
FROM (SELECT t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf, COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) AS all_star_coaches
FROM teams AS t
JOIN teamvsteam AS tvt ON t.tmid = tvt.tmid AND t.year = tvt.year
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.year >= 2006) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference')
GROUP BY t.year, t.tmid, t.name, t.gf
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT a.coachid) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of goals for (GF) across all teams in the Eastern Conference that lost at least one game, calculated per team and then averaged?
